name: cleverbrush-framework
description: Cleverbrush Framework - a set of libraries used by Cleverbrush, a web-based publishing application

scripts.build:all: npm run lint:fix && npm run build && node scripts/update-bundle-badge.js && node scripts/measure-bundle-sizes.js && npm run test && npm run docs && npm run test:coverage && npm run bench:json
scripts.build:schema-site: cd websites/schema && npm run build && cd ../..
scripts.build:docs-site: cd websites/docs && npm run build && cd ../..
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run build && changeset publish
scripts.publish:beta: npm run clean && npm run build && changeset version --snapshot beta && changeset publish --tag beta --no-git-tag
scripts.bench:json: BENCH_JSON=bench-results.json vitest bench --run --project benchmarks && node scripts/relativize-bench-paths.js bench-results.json

author: Andrew Zolotukhin <andrew_zol@cleverbrush.com>
